title: erysimum semperflorens subsp. elatum
intro: Erysimum semperflorens subsp. elatum, also known as Perennial Wallflower or Winter-flowering Wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the genus Erysimum. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, and has been used to treat various health issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and promoting wound healing. Erysimum semperflorens subsp. elatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
